description: Pure-Rust Android decompiler and security-audit suite. DEX → Java, Hermes → JavaScript. Cross-layer taint across the React Native bridge. CycloneDX SBOM + OpenVEX. CLI and MCP. Bytecode is not a security layer.
commit_message:
feat(audit): --fail-on exit gate for pure exit-code CI gating

audit --fail-on=<critical|high|medium|low|info> exits the newly reserved
code 1 (EXIT_FINDINGS in droidsaw-cli-contract) when any emitted finding
is at or above the threshold. stdout still carries the normal audit
output — the run gated, it did not fail; the FailOnTriggered sentinel is
intercepted in main() before the error path so no envelope is written.
Without the flag the 0/2 contract is unchanged. Unknown --fail-on values
are CO
